subcodes.first_line: O thou who art afflicted with the most great calamity! Grievous indeed are the trials and tribulations, for compassion causeth anguish through separation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مصاب بمصیبت کبری مصائب و رزایاء سخت است چه که شفقت سبب حرقت از فرقت است
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
